name: Linux DFIR Live Collection Proof
description: Server-backed live-response proof for Roadmap T on lab-linux01. Executes bounded, non-sensitive Linux metadata collection commands and produces audit-ready artifact evidence shape without claiming full DFIR collector or Velociraptor-class coverage.
claim_boundary: Live endpoint command/audit proof only. Does not prove production DFIR collector orchestration, sensitive artifact collection, live export delivery, analyst review workflow, or Velociraptor-class coverage.

tests.name: Linux DFIR live host metadata collection shape
tests.fallback_command: printf 'tamandua_dfir_host_live hostname=%s kernel=%s machine=%s os=%s collected_at=%s\n' "$(hostname)" "$(uname -r)" "$(uname -m)" "$(. /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null; echo ${ID:-unknown}-${VERSION_ID:-unknown})" "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"

tests.name: Linux DFIR live process snapshot collection shape
tests.fallback_command: count=$(ps -eo pid,ppid,comm --no-headers 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); sample=$(ps -eo pid,ppid,comm --no-headers 2>/dev/null | head -5 | tr '\n' ';' | sed 's/[[:space:]][[:space:]]*/ /g'); printf 'tamandua_dfir_process_live process_count=%s sample_sha256=%s sample=%s\n' "$count" "$(printf '%s' "$sample" | sha256sum | awk '{print $1}')" "$sample"

tests.name: Linux DFIR live service and package inventory collection shape
tests.fallback_command: svc_count=$(systemctl list-units --type=service --no-legend --no-pager 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); pkg_count=$(dpkg-query -W -f='${Package}\n' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); printf 'tamandua_dfir_inventory_live service_count=%s package_count=%s package_db=dpkg\n' "${svc_count:-0}" "${pkg_count:-0}"

tests.name: Linux DFIR live export manifest hash shape
tests.fallback_command: d=/tmp/tamandua-dfir-live-$$; mkdir -p $d; printf 'host=%s\n' "$(hostname)" > $d/host.txt; ps -eo pid,ppid,comm --no-headers 2>/dev/null | head -20 > $d/processes.txt; sha_host=$(sha256sum $d/host.txt | awk '{print $1}'); sha_proc=$(sha256sum $d/processes.txt | awk '{print $1}'); manifest=$(printf 'host.txt:%s;processes.txt:%s' "$sha_host" "$sha_proc"); printf 'tamandua_dfir_manifest_live artifact_count=2 host_sha256=%s processes_sha256=%s manifest_sha256=%s redaction=metadata_only\n' "$sha_host" "$sha_proc" "$(printf '%s' "$manifest" | sha256sum | awk '{print $1}')"; rm -rf $d
